Internal Deal Memo

Project Codename: Operation Sapphire

Date: 15 October 2023

Prepared by: Dr. Tan Wei Ming

To: Mrs. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah

Subject: Proposed Acquisition of Zircon Technologies Pte Ltd

This memorandum outlines the terms of the proposed acquisition under the Sale and Purchase Agreement (the "SPA") for Zircon Technologies Pte Ltd ("Zircon"). The acquisition value is set at SGD 45,000,000. Negotiations are expected to finalize by Q1 2024, contingent on due diligence outcomes. The SPA outlines the conditions and obligations of both parties.

Please note that the project status currently does not align with the initial project plan timelines, requiring additional resources to meet the projected deadlines.

Contact information for follow-up:
- Dr. Tan Wei Ming: +65 6123 4567, tanweiming@example.sg
- Mrs. Siti Aishah: +65 6789 1234, sitiaishah@example.sg

Zircon's UEN is T23LL1234X, and the primary contact is Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, NRIC S8765432G. For secure access, please visit https://secureportal.sg/user/S1234567A.

Please review the SPA and provide feedback by 22 October 2023. Further discussions will be scheduled to address any concerns raised.
